summary: Iteration 18 retest of the 4 follow-up fixes from iteration 17 — all PASS. (1) Community create modal z-index click-hijack: FIXED — POST /api/communities is fired, success toast 'تم إنشاء المجتمع' appears, and page navigates to /communities/<slug> on the 390x844 mobile viewport. (2) useEffect Promise-return crash on 6 additional pages (Incubator/TeamDetail/CommunityDetail/Marketplace/MarketplaceDetail/Feed): VERIFIED FIXED — all pages load cleanly with zero pageerror events and no 'destroy is not a function' overlay. (3) Rebrand completeness: VERIFIED — 0 instances of 'رؤى'/'رؤيا'/'Ru\'ya'/'Ruaa' in rendered HTML of /feed, /explore, /ai; 'مساعد أمورا' appears on /ai. (4) APP_NAME=amora: VERIFIED — new avatar uploads return paths under `/api/uploads/amora/...` (not `ruaa/`). Backend: 8/8 pytest regression tests pass (workspace/today, morning-brief, crm/clients, billing/me, billing/checkout, crm/invoices with persistence, avatar amora/ path, communities create+list). BackButton smoke: 100% correct on 8 non-root routes and 5 root routes.
critical_code_review_comments: social_engine.py POST /api/users/me/avatar (from iter-17, still open): file mime is validated by extension only (ext = filename.split('.')[-1]). Consider validating file.content_type and magic-bytes to prevent arbitrary payload upload with .png filename. Non-blocking security hardening.

Layout.jsx z-index scale is still ad-hoc (nav z-50, back-btn z-40, modal now z-[60]). The current fix works but a documented scale (nav=30, back-btn=40, modal=50+) would prevent future overlap regressions.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created 1 test client + 1 test invoice + 1 test community (all TEST_ prefixed). UI-driven community create added 'مجتمع اختبار 18' (slug: مجتمع-اختبار-18) to the super_admin communities list. Avatar was mutated during the amora/ path verification (avatar_url now points to /api/uploads/amora/avatars/<uid>/<file>.png).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iteration-17 follow-up fixes are green. No blocking issues remain in the tested scope. If future retests are needed, use /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18_regression.py as the regression baseline. Note that login on this build redirects to /feed (not /workspace) after auth — use /feed as the post-login landing URL for automation.

iteration_17_fixes_verified.community_modal_z_index: Modal wrapper raised to z-[60] (Communities.jsx L112). Verified: comm-save click no longer hijacked by bottom nav 'نشر' item — POST /api/communities fires and navigation to /communities/<slug> succeeds on mobile viewport 390x844.
iteration_17_fixes_verified.useeffect_promise_pattern: Verified all 6 files (Incubator/TeamDetail/CommunityDetail/Marketplace/MarketplaceDetail/Feed) now use `useEffect(() => { load(); }, [deps])` with the eslint-disable comment. All routes render without pageerror.
iteration_17_fixes_verified.rebrand_strings: Verified AIAssistant.jsx / Explore.jsx / Feed.jsx no longer contain رؤى-family strings in rendered HTML on /feed, /explore, /ai. مساعد أمورا heading is present on /ai.
iteration_17_fixes_verified.app_name_amora: backend/.env APP_NAME=amora — new avatar upload returned /api/uploads/amora/avatars/<uid>/<file>.png (no more ruaa/ prefix).
